pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk through the house and it feels like i'm a ghost. there's no point in even making breakfast or doing anything... he was the one who did all that. without him, the silence is just deafening. it's like the world stopped but i'm still stuck here.

pool.baseline: i cant stop thinking about how much of a joke it all is. like we spend our whole lives struggling, working, feeling pain, just for the universe to eventually freeze and turn into nothing. in a billion years nothing we do matters. even our memories. it feels so pointless to even keep trying.

pool.baseline: honestly i dont even know why im typing this. been up for 36 hours staring at the same failed data sets and it just feels like... pointless. all the years of work, the funding falling through, the feeling that i've just wasted my entire life for a career that doesn't even want me back. i'm just so beyond tired. not even the kind of tired sleep fixes. just a deep, heavy exhaustion where everything feels too loud and too heavy to keep moving. i just want everything to stop.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the very embers of my soul. How can one continue to breathe when the air itself feels heavy with the weight of his betrayal? Every heartbeat is but a cruel reminder of the life I no longer wish to endure. It feels as though the shadows are calling to me, whispering that there is a certain... peace... waiting in the darkness, far away from this hollow existence.
